reasoning: A 10x increase in a monthly aggregation baseline (from an average of ~154 to over 1,548 per month) is an extreme statistical outlier that effectively never happens without systemic coding changes or true black-swan societal collapse. Strategic developments track non-violent critical junctures (e.g., high-level arrests, peace talks, recruitment drives); scaling this up to ~50 events daily across India is highly implausible. For the first resolution date (May 4, 2025), the 30-day window overlaps mostly with the past month; since no massive societal event has occurred in April 2025, a massive spike is practically impossible. As we look further into the future (October 2025), uncertainty slightly increases but remains overwhelmingly anchored near 0 given the absurdly high 10x threshold required. Probabilities are kept at the absolute minimum (0.05) and scale slightly upwards to reflect temporal uncertainty.
